headerTitle: Senior Modernization Architect  ·  Agentic AI Design & Build  ·  Client-Facing Discovery to MVP  ·  Enterprise AI Transformation
intro: Kyndryl needs a Senior Modernization Architect who leads a client engagement from discovery through working MVP — assessing architecture, designing the roadmap, and building the agentic AI workflows. Six complete cycles, agentic AI systems in production.
bullets: Client-facing discovery to MVP — six complete engagements: mapped current operational environments, produced actionable roadmaps business owners could approve, shipped the working system. Discovery workshops through deployed solution across eight industries.

Agentic AI system design and build — 14 live endpoints using Claude and GPT-4o with multi-model routing, tool-use, MCP protocol, HITL confirm-before-execute, and Zod-validated output. Opinions on agent contract design: schemas, memory strategies, fallback behaviors, escalation paths.

Executive advisory to technical spec — former GM with P&L ownership presented modernization strategy to executive sponsors in business-risk terms, then shifted to API schema with engineering teams in the same conversation. Client-facing deliverables on every engagement.
matchNotes: Strong on client-facing discovery-to-MVP pattern (6x FDE), agentic AI system design/build, exec advisory range (GM background), and Python/TypeScript production stack. Gaps: 10+ yrs requirement, Java proficiency, legacy COBOL/mainframe migration experience, enterprise consulting firm background. Dallas TX is local. $179K-$341K range is exceptional. Honest stretch — apply because the agentic AI + client-facing + TX location combination is rare.
